problem id: 17df2ad5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR NOT SHL(7)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00001010 -> 00000001
  10011001 -> 00010011
  00111000 -> 00000111
  10000110 -> 00010000
  10101101 -> 10010101
  11000001 -> 00011000
  11011101 -> 10011011
  00100010 -> 00000100
  10111101 -> 10010111

query: 00100001
predicted answer: 00000100
